ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart (e.g., Women's Size Chart) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender category of the size chart (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of clothing (e.g., Casual, Formal) */,
  "size_range" TEXT /* Range of sizes included in the chart (e.g., XS-XL) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the size chart is applicable (e.g., US, UK, EU) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the size chart */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size chart is currently active or archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart associated with the measurements */,
  "overbust" TEXT /* Overbust measurement range */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement range */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement range */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement range */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement range (for pants) */,
  "shoulder_width" TEXT /* Shoulder width measurement range */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Chest measurement range (for men's clothing) */,
  "neck" TEXT /* Neck measurement range (for men's clothing) */,
  "a" TEXT /* Measurement for size A */,
  "b" TEXT /* Measurement for size B */,
  "c" TEXT /* Measurement for size C */,
  "d" TEXT /* Measurement for size D */,
  "dd" TEXT /* Measurement for size DD */,
  "e" TEXT /* Measurement for size E */,
  "f" TEXT /* Measurement for size F */,
  "g" TEXT /* Measurement for size G */,
  "gg" TEXT /* Measurement for size GG */,
  "h" TEXT /* Measurement for size H */,
  "hh" TEXT /* Measurement for size HH */,
  "j" TEXT /* Measurement for size J */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the measurement entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "measurements" TEXT /* JSON string containing the customer's measurements */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the customer account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_measurements FOREIGN KEY ("measurements") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "style_guides" (
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style guide entry */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart associated with the style guide */,
  "style_description" TEXT /* Description of the recommended styles for the size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the style guide entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the style guide entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_style_guides_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the return */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being returned */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return (e.g., size issue, defective) */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was processed */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Current status of the return (e.g., pending, processed, refunded) */,
  "return_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or feedback from the customer regarding the return */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the return entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the return entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
